title: Surgeon Vacancy at Fortis Healthcare - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Fortis Healthcare - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Fortis Healthcare are looking for an experienced Surgeon based out of Chandigarh. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Fortis Healthcare:
Fortis Healthcare is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fortis Healthcare!
